title: Configuration
description: Learn how to use Vue Table Touch Scroll

children.value: This page covers common usage patterns for the
directive. For complete configuration options and type definitions, see the

props.code:
import { createApp } from 'vue'
import App from './App.vue'
import VueTableTouchScroll from 'vue-table-touch-scroll'

const app = createApp(App)
app.use(VueTableTouchScroll)
app.mount('#app')

children.value: If you don't need global registration, you can import the directive directly in a component:
For UI libraries with built-in presets, simply pass the
name — no need to manually find scroll container selectors:

For UI libraries without built-in presets, use
to specify the scroll container inside the table:
. If both are provided, the element specified by
will be used. If neither is provided, the directive's bound element itself is used as the scroll container.
Adjust friction and drag threshold based on your use case:
<!-- Smoother: high friction (slow decay), low threshold -->
<!-- More precise: low friction (fast decay), high threshold -->
to completely disable the directive, useful for toggling based on device type:
// Scroll started: close overlays, record start time, etc.
// Scroll ended: trigger analytics, load more data, etc.

html .default .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-default);background: var(--shiki-default-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-default-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-default-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-default-text-decoration);}html .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-default);background: var(--shiki-default-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-default-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-default-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-default-text-decoration);}html .dark .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-dark);background: var(--shiki-dark-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-dark-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-dark-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-dark-text-decoration);}html.dark .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-dark);background: var(--shiki-dark-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-dark-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-dark-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-dark-text-decoration);}
